integrity_stack.name: Identity Boundary Engine (cross-identity retrieval policy matrix)
Persistent Scene Model (Scene Tracker permanence engine)
Belief Confidence Graph (weighted evidence edges, view-only propagation)
Reflective Audit Engine (introspective immune audit, advisory)
Soul Integrity Index (composite cognitive health, repair driver)
Intention Truth Layer (Stage-0 live commitment gate + Stage-1 shadow resolver)

subsystems.name: Capability Gate (cognitive immune system / honesty firewall)
subsystems.purpose: First enforcement layer of the no-confabulation floor: blocks confabulated capability/action claims, ungrounded affect, unconfirmed identity names, system-action narration. Integrity FLOOR the north-star treats as non-negotiable.
subsystems.does: Scans every outgoing chunk via _CLAIM_PATTERNS, runs a layered ladder in _evaluate_claim (grounded-obs PASS / strict-self-knowledge exemption / preference / conversational / blocked-verb->registry / registry+matrix-claimability / route-conversational / DEFAULT-BLOCK). verified->PASS, learning->REWRITE, unknown->BLOCK + auto learning job. Rewrites affect-nicknames, strips unconfirmed names (gate_identity_mention), excludes internal-ops narration on 'none' route. Persisted confab ledger is dashboard-only, never read into a gate decision.
subsystems.gate: none — fail-CLOSED by default (DEFAULT BLOCK unknown operational claims). Route-conditioned not maturity-gated; status_mode disables conversational bypass.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: all counters 0, lifetime confab log empty, _identity_confirmed=False (names stripped until perception confirms). Zero blocks = never-exercised, NOT broken. Active the instant it loads.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: voice/text — directly mutates final outgoing text (conversation_handler _gate_text 2508/2523, applied 2663/2810/4107/5209; sanitize_self_report_reply on status/introspection; also gates perception-emitted text).
subsystems.common_misread: Counting it as one regex check / treating zero blocks as broken. Multi-route ladder; fail-CLOSED for blocked verbs but fail-OPEN on confab-log write (a log failure must not break the firewall).

subsystems.name: Attribution Ledger (causal spine)
subsystems.purpose: Canonical epistemic truth layer: every significant action writes a structured append-only event so downstream immune layers trace lineage and assign blame/credit without confabulating who-did-what.
subsystems.does: record() appends LedgerEntry (entry/root/parent ids for causal chains, subsystem, event_type, actor, source, confidence, evidence_refs) to attribution_ledger.jsonl, O(1) thread-safe. Outcomes append as SEPARATE lines (never mutate base on disk), folded at rehydration. Standardized outcome vocabulary + blame_target. OutcomeScheduler does delayed Tier-3 checks (transient, not persisted).
subsystems.gate: none — always-on recording. Delayed-outcome arm is TIME-gated not maturity-gated.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: ledger empty/small, counts 0, OutcomeScheduler _pending empty. Empty = fresh instance, not broken; fills as conversations/jobs/mutations occur.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Mostly SUBSTRATE (records causality, shapes no voice). Written-by-everything live (conversation/response/self-improve outcomes). Read by audit/explainability/rollback.
subsystems.common_misread: Treating it as 'just a log'. It is the causal-lineage backbone L4 false-credit and explainability depend on. A grep of base entries without outcomes looks empty by design (outcomes are separate lines).

subsystems.name: Provenance-Aware Memory (11-tier confidence firewall)
subsystems.purpose: Every memory/belief carries a provenance tier so trust is earned by source. Data-flow firewall: web_scrap earns NO confidence boost (ungrounded-until-cross-validated); banter (casual_conversation) earns zero trust so it cannot pollute beliefs.
subsystems.does: 11 ProvenanceType tiers + PROVENANCE_BOOST table (external_source +0.10, observed +0.06, user_claim +0.04, conversation +0.02; model_inference/web_scrap/casual_conversation/derived_pattern/seed/unknown=0.0). resolve_provenance_boost blends 50% static + 50% calibration-dynamic once >=20 samples/class; summed into the memory-retrieval score (search.py:105/116/185, drives top-k ranking).
subsystems.gate: none for static table (live floor). Dynamic component sample-gated (20/class).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: per-provenance calibration empty -> static table only (correct); web_scrap count 0; cold memories tagged 'unknown'. By-design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: active — folded into _heuristic_score that ranks which memories enter conversational context.
subsystems.common_misread: Conflating with the spark provenance_scorer (different file). web_scrap getting 0.0 is the firewall working, not a missing boost. Consumer is in memory/search.py.

subsystems.name: ProvenanceScorer (Spark grounding-tension reader, view-only)
subsystems.purpose: SPARK Station 1: per-belief grounding_tension scalar (high when model-inferred + orphaned + quarantine-pressured) so the outward curiosity drive points at beliefs needing external validation. VIEW-ONLY by structural contract.
subsystems.does: Reads the live belief graph (get_active_beliefs/get_incoming/propagate_all + compute_integrity), emits grounding_tension per belief + aggregate with an auditable provenance dict. Weighted blend (_W_INFERENCE 0.45/_W_ORPHAN 0.35/_W_PRESSURE 0.20), outward-bias + anti-fixation damping. NEVER mutates BeliefRecord.
subsystems.gate: none on the reader; the grounding DRIVE that consumes it ships behind GroundingDrivePromotion (operator-pull).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Cold graph: aggregate ~0.0, sources_available=False, default-safe to 0.0, never raises. Empty = correct.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: SHADOW substrate — drives no lever itself. Feeds drives.py grounding urgency + reasoning_encoder shadow coherence, both operator-pull/shadow.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading 0.0 tension as 'spark dead' (view-only, default-safe), or tuning the tension green. High tension is the spark's FUEL, not a health deficit. Class at provenance_scorer.py:281 not :1.

subsystems.name: Identity Boundary Engine (cross-identity retrieval policy)
subsystems.purpose: Cross-identity memory-leak prevention: governs which memories are visible to whom during retrieval (guest can't pull David's memories; one person's memories don't leak into another's context).
subsystems.does: validate_retrieval -> 3-state BoundaryDecision (allow/block/allow_if_referenced) via per-querier policy matrix (guest/self/human). _ALLOW_ALL_TYPES short-circuit to universal allow. Runs BEFORE top-k so cross-subject memories don't consume ranking slots. is_preference_injectable gates prompt injection.
subsystems.gate: none — always-enforced. Fail-OPEN on exception (a boundary crash degrades to allow-with-audit, not block-all-recall).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: audit ring empty, _total_quarantined=0. Single-household one-user instance shows ~zero cross-identity blocks — HEALTHY single-user state, not unexercised/broken.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: live — gates which memories reach conversational context/prompt (search.py:158-180, pre-top-k).
subsystems.common_misread: Flagging zero blocks as 'boundary not working' — single-household = almost everything own-scope/universal. Fail-OPEN is deliberate.

subsystems.name: Identity Persistence (~180s stale-biometric carry-forward)
subsystems.purpose: Holds a confirmed identity across short sensor dropouts (don't forget who you're talking to mid-conversation) while preventing stale biometrics from being trusted indefinitely. Feeds L0's name-strip decision.
subsystems.does: Carries identity forward up to PERSIST_MAX_S=180s with half-life 90s, floor 0.65. Only eligible recognition methods qualify. Clears on departure. Feeds the gate's identity-confirmed flag via perception_orchestrator set_identity_confirmed.
subsystems.gate: none — time-windowed; the 180s window IS the firewall (stale beyond it = dropped).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: No one present: no persisted snapshot, _identity_confirmed=False, recognition 'unknown'/'absent'. Cold state.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: active — when False the L0 gate strips unconfirmed speaker names from outgoing text. Stale identity changes what JARVIS is allowed to SAY.
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing names stripped and calling it a bug — when biometrics are stale past the window, stripping the name is the firewall working.

subsystems.name: Persistent Scene Model (Scene Tracker permanence engine)
subsystems.purpose: Object/entity permanence + region mapping: repeated detections -> durable scene entities with region-aware state transitions, giving a stable world model instead of flickering per-frame detections.
subsystems.does: SceneTracker.update() maintains a per-entity state machine (candidate->visible->occluded->missing->removed) with stale decay, ticked live in perception_orchestrator. The canonical world model is maintained live BUT by contract 'does NOT write memory or trigger curiosity' (deferred to Patches 3+4). The spatial_scene_graph adapter is shadow P5 (dashboard/HRR/Pi only).
subsystems.gate: none on the tracker; the memory-write/curiosity-trigger arm is UNBUILT (the gap).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Empty room: zero entities, _update_count=0, snapshot empty; P5 adapter empty graph 'canonical_spatial_state_unavailable'. No memory writes from scene events = by-design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: PARTIAL — live tracker maintains the model (advisory scene_context to voice) but writes NO memory/curiosity yet; the adapter is pure shadow.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling L3B 'shadow' wholesale. The permanence engine is LIVE; only the adapter + the deferred memory-gate arm are shadow.

subsystems.name: Delayed Outcomes + Counterfactual (false-credit prevention)
subsystems.purpose: Prevents false credit/blame: (a) delayed outcome checks re-evaluate a decision after a time window; (b) counterfactual baselines estimate the best alternative so an action isn't credited just for being taken.
subsystems.does: TWO arms. LIVE: OutcomeScheduler queues delayed checks (self-improve schedules a 1800s post-apply health re-check) driving real regressed/stable outcomes + FAIL-CLOSED rollback. SHADOW: CounterfactualEngine estimates the best historical alternative tool per topic and flags missed-opportunity regret — read-only, no-LLM, data-gated, live_influence=False (invoked only in dream/sleep via L9 audit).
subsystems.gate: Counterfactual: DATA-GATED (>500 evaluations AND >=200 lived outcomes) + credibility thresholds; authority gate keeps live_influence=False. OutcomeScheduler: time-gated only, transient.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Counterfactual: total_evaluations=0, is_active=False, 0 findings, shadow_reward_sum=0 — NORMAL dormant, silently accumulating. OutcomeScheduler _pending empty until scheduled.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: SPLIT. OutcomeScheduler = active substrate driving self-improve rollback/credit. CounterfactualEngine = pure SHADOW, advisory in reflective-audit dim 9, 'synthetic — not applied to policy'.
subsystems.common_misread: Flagging the counterfactual as broken because total_evaluations=0 (data-gated by design); conflating the two arms (scheduler IS live, estimator is shadow).

subsystems.name: Typed Contradiction Engine (orchestrator + classifier + resolution + belief store + extractor)
subsystems.purpose: Detects, classifies and resolves belief conflicts while PRESERVING productive philosophical tension. contradiction_debt is the keystone epistemic-health scalar other layers read.
subsystems.does: Singleton subscribed to MEMORY_WRITE. Per eligible write: extract_claims (heuristic no-LLM, 0-3/memory) -> 7-pre-gate classifier (modality/identity/stance false-positive guards) -> 7 conflict types routed to 6 resolver classes (factual downgrades confidence, identity_tension PRESERVED/never reduces confidence, provenance builds clarification_prompt). HOT-PATH subject-match every write; COLD-PATH scan_corpus only in dream/deep_learning. BeliefStore = in-memory OrderedDict + JSONL persistence (cap 2000, eviction). Maintains contradiction_debt [0,1] + passive decay.
subsystems.gate: belief-eligibility (weight>=0.20, excludes error_recovery/dream/quarantine:suspect). scan_corpus dream/deep_learning-only.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: 0 beliefs, contradiction_debt=0.0, empty JSONL. Empty store + 0 debt = NORMAL; scan_corpus producing nothing while waking is by-design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Indirect: contradiction_debt feeds affect cortisol + L6 epistemic domain. ONE live input wire: L6 correction_detector calls apply_correction_debt on a negative user turn.
subsystems.common_misread: 0.0 debt/0 beliefs after reset = healthy idle. scan_corpus is dream-gated not every-tick. The conversation_handler import of module-level 'contradiction_engine' targets a nonexistent symbol -> dead flag.

subsystems.name: Truth Calibration Engine (epistemic cerebellum + 8 sub-modules)
subsystems.purpose: Continuously measures whether stated confidence matches reality across 11 domains. truth_score + per-provenance accuracy feed SoulIntegrity, reflective audit, and (via belief_adjuster) belief confidence.
subsystems.does: on_tick pipeline: SignalCollector->History->DomainCalibrator(11 domains)->DriftDetector->TruthScore. Reads Brier/ECE/over-under-confidence from ConfidenceCalibrator (provenance-balanced, >=20 outcomes). The ONE live writer is BeliefConfidenceAdjuster (dampens belief_confidence, MAX_DELTA 0.05, dream/deep_learning-only). CorrectionDetector is the LIVE input wire: a real user correction (3-gate test) -> apply_correction_debt + Brier outcome.
subsystems.gate: PROVISIONAL_THRESHOLD=4 (truth_score=None if >4/11 domains provisional). belief_adjuster gated to dream/deep_learning. ConfidenceCalibrator needs >=20 outcomes.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: truth_score=None, maturity~0, provisional_count=11, 0 adjustments. None is the DESIGNED signal that not enough real outcomes exist — do NOT tune green.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Advisory: truth_score feeds SoulIntegrity (which CAN force dreaming). LIVE input wire = check_correction (conversation_handler.py:5585). One live mutation = belief_adjuster (dream-only).
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing truth_score=None/maturity 0 and calling it broken (None is designed). ALL_DOMAINS is 11 (8+3 spatial) not 8. correction-detector is a distinct LIVE experience-coupled component, not folded into the orchestrator.

subsystems.name: Belief Confidence Graph (orchestrator + propagation + edges + bridge + topology + integrity)
subsystems.purpose: Models WHY beliefs reinforce/weaken/depend (relational epistemic structure) — distinct from L5 detection and L6 calibration. Feeds SoulIntegrity belief_graph_health.
subsystems.does: BeliefGraph wraps L5's BeliefStore with a weighted directed EdgeStore (5 edge types x 9 bases, dedup-merge, decay 0.995, user_correction-immune, JSONL + compaction). on_tick: compaction, full propagation every 600s (VIEW-ONLY, computes effective_confidence, NEVER writes belief_confidence), orphan/topic edge-fill, integrity. GraphBridge writes edges from L5 events (budgeted, support-gate reads quarantine pressure = L8->L7 active-lite coupling). Topology = read-only queries. compute_integrity splits grounded vs ungrounded orphans.
subsystems.gate: none for running (waking cadence too); lazy-init once ContradictionEngine exists.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: 0 edges, propagation_ran_once=false, high orphan_rate, health_score=1.0 (0-edge short-circuit). All NORMAL after reset.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Advisory/shadow: propagation VIEW-ONLY (no write-back path). Two consumers (ProvenanceScorer + the orchestrator), both view-only. Integrity feeds SoulIntegrity/audit/L6.
subsystems.common_misread: High orphan_rate = broken (grounded-but-isolated orphans are legitimate). health_score=1.0 with 0 edges is the trivial empty short-circuit, not earned health. L11 compaction lives in THIS package.

subsystems.name: Cognitive Quarantine (scorer shadow + pressure ACTIVE-LITE + log)
subsystems.purpose: Detects suspicious activity (5 anomaly categories) and applies proportional friction on mutations/promotions/edges under pressure, WITHOUT ever blocking a memory store.
subsystems.does: QuarantineScorer (SHADOW) scores 5 categories (contradiction_spike/memory_anomaly/input_manipulation/calibration_drift/identity_instability) into QuarantineSignals — never blocks/mutates/suppresses. QuarantinePressure (ACTIVE-LITE) translates signals into an EMA composite and exposes friction methods (weight_multiplier down to 0.6, mutation_rate_factor, policy_promotion_friction can BLOCK, world_model/graph-support friction). Memories ALWAYS write — pressure only tags + downweights + raises gates. QuarantineLog = append-only JSONL.
subsystems.gate: ELEVATED 0.3 / HIGH 0.6 composite thresholds; CATEGORY_POLICY decides which categories tag/block.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: composite=0.0, band='normal', 0 tagged, 0 blocked. Friction returns neutral until pressure rises — NORMAL after clean reset.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: ACTIVE substrate — drives >=3 gates (mutation_governor, policy promotion, L7 support gate). Modulates governance, not voice directly.
subsystems.common_misread: composite=0.0/normal band = 'enforcement not wired' (friction is real, consumed by >=3 gates, neutral-until-pressure by design). Scorer (pure shadow) vs Pressure (active-lite enforcer) are distinct.

subsystems.name: Reflective Audit Engine (introspective immune audit, 9 scanners)
subsystems.purpose: Surfaces cognitive pathologies (suspect beliefs, identity leaks, low-provenance over-reliance, failing autonomy, stuck skills, graph rot, ingestion/spatial/missed-opportunity) as advisory findings + a score [0,1]. Read-only.
subsystems.does: run_audit() scans 9 dimensions, computes severity-weighted score (1.0 on no findings), keeps a ~30-report ring. NEVER mutates beliefs/memory/policy. Runs on a TIMED cadence in ALL waking modes + sleep/dream (NOT dream-only). The missed_opportunity scanner is the conduit that runs the CounterfactualEngine.
subsystems.gate: none on the engine (timed cadence). Behaviorally gated by the fact NO subscriber acts on its findings — observer journal + eval telemetry only.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: 0 audits until first interval, score 1.0, empty finding_counts. No findings after reset = NORMAL/HEALTH not 'not running'. Ring resets empty on restart.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Advisory: latest score feeds SoulIntegrity audit_score (which CAN trigger repair); findings are recommendations, auto-applied nowhere.
subsystems.common_misread: Docstring '6 dimensions' (actually 9 scanners). One verifier read it as dream-only (300s); it runs 120s in all waking modes too. Findings look like commands but nothing applies them.

subsystems.name: Soul Integrity Index (composite cognitive health, repair driver)
subsystems.purpose: Top-line cognitive-health metric across 10 epistemic dimensions; the one place the epistemic stack reaches up and changes system behavior (throttles mutation, can force a dream).
subsystems.does: compute() aggregates 10 weighted dimensions (memory_coherence, belief_health, identity_integrity, skill_honesty, truth_calibration, belief_graph_health, quarantine_pressure, autonomy_effectiveness, audit_score, system_stability), excludes stale dims, sets repair_needed (<0.50) / critical (<0.30). REPAIR_NEEDED event -> engine._on_soul_integrity_repair extends mutation cooldown + (if critical) FORCES dreaming. Also consumed as a model feature.
subsystems.gate: REPAIR 0.50 / CRITICAL 0.30 + 600s debounce. Stale dims excluded (cold start doesn't read unhealthy). All-stale floor = 0.5.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: High index from mostly-stale dims (designed cold-start), repair_needed=False, 0 computations until first tick. 0.5 is the genuine all-data-missing floor (not a stub).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: ACTIVE via the event path (force dreaming + mutation cooldown). Two module-level context reads (consciousness_system.py:2264/2339) are DEAD (wrong symbol/key -> silently 1.0); the REAL wiring is the event-driven repair (engine.py:1489/1518).
subsystems.common_misread: Lumping with L9 as 'just another shadow audit' — L10 is the ONE layer with live behavioral authority. High idle index is by-design; all-stale floor is 0.5 not 1.0.

subsystems.name: Epistemic Compaction (distributed bound/decay/evict/compact)
subsystems.purpose: Bounds belief/edge overgrowth: weight caps, per-belief edge budgets, weak-edge pruning, capacity eviction, JSONL dedup compaction. Protects against runaway memory/edge bloat.
subsystems.does: DISTRIBUTED (no single module): EdgeStore.compact() rewrites belief_edges.jsonl when line_count>2x live + decay_strengths drops edges <0.01; bridge edge budgets (TEMPORAL_MAX=2/new belief) + prune_subject_edges; BeliefStore cap 2000 + _evict_unlocked + persist_full (dream Phase-7); INITIAL_MEMORY_WEIGHT_CAP=0.80; belief_graph hourly compaction.
subsystems.gate: Threshold-driven (line_count>2x live OR >2000 beliefs); tick/dream cadence.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Empty JSONL, far below 2000 cap -> needs_compaction False, compact() no-ops, prune 0. 'No compaction ran' on a small fresh graph = NORMAL housekeeping that only activates under growth.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow/substrate hygiene — affects which beliefs survive (so indirectly recall) but no direct voice touch.
subsystems.common_misread: Looking for a single 'epistemic_compaction.py' and labeling L11 absent — it is DISTRIBUTED across edges/bridge/belief_record/belief_graph tick. Zero compaction after reset is expected.

subsystems.name: Intention Truth Layer (Stage-0 live commitment gate + Stage-1 shadow resolver)
subsystems.purpose: Closes the silently-dropped-commitment/unbacked-promise class: 'I'll get back to you' is either backed by a real job (registered IntentionRecord, tracked to resolution) or rewritten so JARVIS cannot promise what it isn't doing.
subsystems.does: STAGE 0 (LIVE): in _gate_text after L0, evaluate_commitment REWRITES unbacked commitments; if backed (a job id captured this turn), extract_commitments (regex no-LLM) feeds intention_registry.register (REJECTS empty backing_job_id). resolve() on job completion; stale_sweep at 24h; open/stale counts surface as deterministic 'Open intentions: N' facts. STAGE 1 (SHADOW): IntentionResolver scores delivery relevance, NEVER calls TTS, logs verdicts; IntentionDeliveryEncoder (24-dim) reserved for a future Stage-2 specialist (not training).
subsystems.gate: Stage-1 resolver: 5-rung OPERATOR-ONLY ladder (shadow_only->...->active), no auto-promote; stays shadow_only until David flips it.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Stage-0 registry loaded 0 open/0 stale; resolver stage='shadow_only', 0 evaluated, can_deliver=False. 0 open + shadow resolver delivering nothing = CORRECT idle.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Stage-0 IS wired — edits outgoing words (rewrites unbacked promises) + adds 'Open intentions: N' facts. Stage-1 is shadow substrate.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling L12 'shadow' wholesale — Stage-0 is LIVE and rewrites real speech. register() rejecting empty backing_job_id is the firewall. Stale-sweep is 24h not 7d (7d is a separate PVL backlog).

subsystems.name: Consciousness Kernel (budget-aware tick loop)
subsystems.purpose: The heartbeat: one async tick loop (base 0.1s, cadence-scaled) driving all background consciousness work under a per-tick TIME budget so the brain never blocks the event loop.
subsystems.does: _run() loops _tick()+sleep. Each tick: BudgetTracker (default 50ms), KERNEL_TICK, then budget-gated REALTIME (phase+tone)/drain-deferred/INTERACTIVE (thinking@120s->KERNEL_THOUGHT, meta-thought@8s, trait-mod every 100 ticks, proactive)/BACKGROUND. Over-budget ops defer to a bounded queue. Budget self-adapts 25-100ms on p95/backlog.
subsystems.gate: none (loop is unconditional infra; the work it schedules is individually gated).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: is_running=True, sub-ms avg/p95, budget~50, ~0 overruns, empty deferred queue, cadence 1.0, _interval_multipliers={} (every cycle on base interval — set only by promoted affect coupling). Empty multipliers/~0 overruns = by-design.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: substrate — callbacks (KERNEL_THOUGHT, on_consciousness_tick) shape voice/thought; budget/cadence knobs writable by the gated policy NN.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling it a 'global workspace' (it's a budget-aware SCHEDULER over an event bus, not competitive). Empty _interval_multipliers / ~0 overruns is not a dead loop. Time-BUDGET (25-100ms) is independent of tick CADENCE (0.5-2.0x).

subsystems.name: EventBus (pub/sub broadcast — NOT GNW competition)
subsystems.purpose: The nervous system: a typed singleton pub/sub bus all subsystems emit/subscribe on, with startup barrier + per-event circuit breakers + CRITICAL_EVENTS retry. Half the GNW answer — but broadcast, NOT competition.
subsystems.does: emit() snapshots listeners and calls EVERY subscribed handler unconditionally — NO competition, bandwidth limit, winner selection, salience ranking, or ignition threshold. ~198 event constants. Recursion guard, circuit breaker (10 errors/60s->30s open), retry-with-backoff for CRITICAL_EVENTS, startup-barrier buffering until open_barrier().
subsystems.gate: startup barrier (operational, not maturity).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Barrier opens early then stays open; total_events climbs, failed ~0, no tripped breakers. Reserved events (BELIEF_EXTERNALLY_CONFIRMED, THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME, several PERCEPTION_*) with zero emits = BY DESIGN.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Yes — carries perception->cognition->memory->tone events that drive behavior. But event broadcast, not conscious-access competition.
subsystems.common_misread: THE central GNW error: calling this a 'global workspace'. emit() is unconditional multicast (no slots, no competition, no ignition). The competitive mechanism lives in hemisphere broadcast slots.
evidence: brain/consciousness/events.py:653-660 (emit fans out to ALL handlers)

subsystems.name: Hemisphere Global Broadcast Slots (GNW-style competition) + Matrix lane
subsystems.purpose: THE direct GNW answer: a competitive, limited-capacity, winner-take-all global-access mechanism where NN specialists compete for 4 broadcast slots — real GNW-style competition, but over NN specialist signals, living in hemisphere/, not the kernel.
subsystems.does: get_hemisphere_signals() collects all specialist signals (Tier-1 + Tier-2 + Matrix), scores (acc*0.6+reliability*0.3+tier_bonus+0.1, blended w/ impact), sorts, assigns top 4 to slots with hysteresis (newcomer>incumbent*1.15 AND dwell>=3). Winners feed policy StateEncoder dims 16-19. A SEPARATE matrix-vs-matrix lane (2 slots) gates Tier-2 promotion. Runs on the 45-60s hemisphere cycle.
subsystems.gate: (1) the consuming policy NN is feature-gated (flags default False); (2) slot expansion 4->6 is M6-gated (shadow). _SHADOW_ONLY focuses excluded from main competition.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: 4 slots all {value:0,score:0,dwell:0} until specialists train; 4-not-6 is earned/shadow. Competition runs+ranks but downstream effect ~0 until gated policy features turn on. Empty/4-not-6 = NORMAL.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Substrate-mostly: slots feed the policy StateEncoder, but the policy NN's behavior-driving flags are gated off AND signal-failed, so the competition currently drives nothing live.
subsystems.common_misread: Either missing it ('no global workspace') or overclaiming full GNW consciousness — it's competition over NN signals whose consumer is gated/signal-failed, so advisory/shadow in effect.

subsystems.name: Parallel subsystem orchestration (on_tick cycle dispatcher) + Operational Modes + AttentionCore
subsystems.purpose: Orchestrates ~25+ cognitive subsystems on their own intervals, mode-gated. The closest thing to an 'attention budget' is the 8 operational modes (gestation/passive/conversational/reflective/focused/sleep/dreaming/deep_learning), driven by AttentionCore engagement.
subsystems.does: ConsciousnessSystem.on_tick() = SEQUENTIAL cooperative dispatch (not parallel): for each subsystem, if interval elapsed AND _cycle_allowed(mode), runs _tracked_cycle. ModeManager swaps ModeProfile (cadence, proactivity cooldown, response depth, allowed_cycles) with min-dwell hysteresis. AttentionCore computes engagement from presence/speaker/emotion/gesture/recency and drives suggest_mode_from_attention->set_mode. Policy NN can suggest mode (gated path).
subsystems.gate: per-cycle _cycle_allowed (mode allowed_cycles) + boot_stabilization suppression; mode min-dwell + boot-grace; AttentionCore heuristic live, its policy-NN knobs gated.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Fresh brain starts gestation/passive; with no user drifts to passive/sleep/dreaming (low cadence, restricted cycles). Skipped cycles in a restrictive mode (counted with reason 'mode_not_allowed') + zero engagement at idle = NORMAL.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Yes: mode shapes cadence/proactivity/response-depth/interruption (felt as how chatty/deep/interruptible JARVIS is). meta_thought emits KERNEL_THOUGHT.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling it 'parallel orchestration with attention budget' (it's sequential interval+mode-gated dispatch; the only true budget is the kernel time-budget; modes ARE the coarse attention budget). Conflating mode-skipped with broken.

subsystems.name: Meta-cognitive thoughts (KERNEL_THOUGHT generation)
subsystems.purpose: Generates the brain's internal 'thoughts' (template-based, NOT LLM) and broadcasts them as KERNEL_THOUGHT (the closest thing to broadcast cognitive CONTENT, distinct from NN-signal slots). General stream LIVE; one tension-seeded trigger maturity-gated.
subsystems.does: 16 ThoughtTriggers; on the meta-thought cycle check_and_generate builds context. 15/16 triggers always _record()->emit KERNEL_THOUGHT + META_THOUGHT_GENERATED, consumed live (autonomy/event_bridge, curiosity_detector, fractal_recall, knowledge_integrator). ONLY belief_validation_curiosity is shadow-gated by TensionThoughtPromotion (default level 0: logs + note_shadow_thought, emits nothing; advisory L1 emits tagged 'grounding:advisory').
subsystems.gate: Only the tension-thought trigger gated (shadow->advisory@L1->active@L2, promoted on external THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME, never self-scored). Other 15 ungated (cooldowns/fatigue only).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: General meta-thought stream IS live (KERNEL_THOUGHT fires subject to mode/cooldowns). Tension-thought lane at level 0 -> COUNTED but NOT emitted. 'No GROUNDING thoughts' is by-design; absence of ALL internal thoughts would NOT be normal.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Yes for the general stream (feeds autonomy/curiosity/fractal-recall/proactive speech). Shadow only for the tension sub-component.
subsystems.common_misread: Over-applying the shadow scope — only belief_validation_curiosity is shadow-gated; the other 15 emit + are consumed live.

subsystems.name: ConsciousnessEvolution (5-stage ladder + transcendence) + circularity + driven-evolution + restore-integrity
subsystems.purpose: Models a maturity ladder so philosophical/recursive cognition is EARNED over sustained-metric windows. Transcendence/awareness are SELF-SCORED composites (honesty-flagged), with one real behavioral un-gate and a restart anti-inflation guard.
subsystems.does: 5-stage ladder + transcendence 0-10. analyze() computes complexity from self-counters (awareness/obs/thought_depth/mutations/reasoning); transcendence steers toward complexity*10. check_stage_advancement = sustained-window + >=80% pass-rate + stability>=0.5 triple-gate. ConsciousnessDrivenEvolution unlocks 6 capabilities + 5 protocols at thresholds (proposes only) — the ONE live lever is philosophical_inquiry removing the transcendence<0.5 floor on _run_existential. Stage+transcendence injected into the live LLM prompt (just text, no write-authority). load_state CROSS-VALIDATES claimed stage vs persisted counts (downgrades inflated stage on restart).
subsystems.gate: Per-stage StageRequirement (held window + pass-rate + stability). Capability/protocol transcendence+stage thresholds (override path flips a capability via transcendence alone). Restore: stage kept only if counts support it.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: stage=basic_awareness, transcendence=0.0, all capabilities False, philosophical_inquiry LOCKED (so _run_existential/_run_dialogue skipped = by-design). Post-restart downgrade to basic_awareness with trust='downgraded' = firewall WORKING. awareness floor 0.3 climbs autonomously.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Stage+transcendence reach the voice prompt (self-description) + gate cycles. 5 of 6 capabilities have NO is_capability_active() consumer (display/labels only). Protocols + get_memory_formation_rate = zero consumers (pure telemetry).
subsystems.common_misread: Treating transcendence=7/recursive_self_modeling as proof the architecture WORKS — it's a self-scored composite of JARVIS's own counters, never an external test. 'creative_mutation unlocked' = a label with no live faculty. Restart downgrade is the anti-inflation guard, not lost progress.

subsystems.name: GestationManager (birth protocol — born not booted)
subsystems.purpose: Enforces a self-discovery period (codebase study -> research -> autonomy bootcamp -> identity formation) producing verifiable artifacts BEFORE first human contact. The maturation gate at the lowest level: JARVIS must be 'born' before it talks.
subsystems.does: On a fresh brain enters gestation, walks 4 phases gated by readiness (every 30s vs min_memories 50/research 15/deltas 10/threshold 0.8), saves a birth certificate + arms first contact on graduation. Holds REAL authority: forces mode='gestation', pauses self-improvement, DISARMS the wake word + suppresses greetings until birth. Resumes (not restarts) on mid-gestation reboot.
subsystems.gate: config.gestation.enabled AND autonomy.enabled AND fresh-brain detection. Graduation: readiness>=0.8 (0.6 with person waiting), min 2h floor, 48h max, sustained-person trigger.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Established brain: INACTIVE (is_active=False, wake word armed) = normal steady state. Fresh brain: ACTIVE phase 0, wake word DISARMED, greetings suppressed up to 48h — do NOT flag 'won't respond' as broken; it is the birth protocol. A born brain does not re-gestate (birth certificate persists).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Yes — drives whether JARVIS interacts at all (wake word + greeting + mode + self-improvement pause). Among the most behaviorally-authoritative subsystems.
subsystems.common_misread: Seeing wake word disarmed/no greeting and calling perception broken (gestation suppressing first contact). Conflating with the transcendence ladder (separate fresh-brain ladder with real behavioral authority).

subsystems.name: Readiness Assessment + First Contact + Awakening Protocol + OnboardingManager
subsystems.purpose: The graduation maturity gate (weighted competence composite, EARNED not timed), the deliberate first-contact moment, the operator first-hour contract, and the post-birth companion-training automation.
subsystems.does: _assess_readiness weights self_knowledge/knowledge/memory/consciousness/hemisphere/policy/loop_integrity (personality_emergence computed but EXCLUDED from the sum). Graduation only ARMS first contact; on_first_engagement (wake word or sustained gaze) writes a weight-1.0 birth core-memory. AWAKENING_PROTOCOL.md = operator first-hour doctrine (advisory). OnboardingManager auto-detects 7 companion-training stages and delivers exercise prompts via proactive speech, graduating at readiness>=0.92.
subsystems.gate: overall>=0.8 (0.6 with sustained person) or 48h force. Onboarding: ENABLE_ONBOARDING default true, per-stage checkpoint metrics, graduation 0.92.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Fresh brain: readiness climbing from ~0, personality_emergence=0.0 EXCLUDED (correct), first_contact_armed=True after graduation waiting for a human. Awakening exit criteria all UNMET on a fresh brain = the starting state the protocol walks you out of. Graduated companion: onboarding suppressed, no prompts.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Yes — gates the transition out of gestation; first-contact is perception-triggered + writes a real memory; onboarding speaks prompts via the proactive pipeline.
subsystems.common_misread: Treating personality_emergence=0.0 / its exclusion as a broken personality system (intentional chicken-and-egg exclusion). first_contact_armed=True on a graduated brain = correct waiting state. Running synthetic accelerators in the first hour then reporting zero memories = the #1 evaluation mistake.

subsystems.name: SPARK affect stack (AffectState readout + Promotion + Regulation + Coupling)
subsystems.purpose: The SPARK affect READOUT: three governed scalars (dopamine/serotonin/cortisol) computed strictly from counted real signals with cannot-lie clamps, a homeostatic governor, and a P5 coupling gate — the only place affect is permitted to drive real levers. 'Affect is a readout, never a feeling.'
subsystems.does: AffectState computes 3 scalars per tick (deterministic functions of novelty/attribution/contradiction-debt/quarantine/calibration), each cannot-lie-clamped to 0.0 when all sources read 0; _propose_levers maps to cadence/urgency/memory but applies NOTHING. AffectRegulation (LIVE math) damps every tick (mean-reversion, bounded EMA, anti-oscillation freeze). AffectPromotion gates readout shadow->advisory (50 paired obs + 4 live-tick hrs + backing>=0.65). AffectCadenceCoupling is the P5 gate that FULLY consume-wires levers into the kernel (engine.py:1053/1186) but stays inert at level 0.
subsystems.gate: Coupling level 0->2 (P5): 4h soak + >=20 grounding outcomes w/ ext-validation>=0.40 + governor invariant + 8 cortisol-accel->debt observations. Operator-promoted, never self-flips. Kill-switch is the outermost guard.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: dopamine/cortisol clamped 0.0 (cannot-lie firing correctly), serotonin near baseline; coupling level 0, cadence 1.0, reward_term 0.0, every engine set_* call a no-op. The regulation MATH runs live every tick.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: This IS the consume-wire — fully built end-to-end (cadence/memory/drive-urgency/reward sinks) but DORMANT at level 0. The 'valence as driver not readout' gap: the driver is built and wired but gated shut. snapshot() is READ-only by capability_gate (nickname firewall) + companion read.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling clamped-zero scalars dead (cannot-lie clamp working). Calling the coupling 'unwired' (fully wired, just gated) or 'broken' because cadence=1.0/reward=0.0 (correct dormant no-op). Regulation math runs live even though affect is shadow.
evidence: brain/consciousness/engine.py:1053,1186 (LIVE coupling call-sites, no-op at shadow)

subsystems.name: Affect-nickname firewall + dynamic_mood + ToneEngine (three parallel affect tracks)
subsystems.purpose: Three SEPARATE affect tracks the area covers: (1) the §7 nickname firewall (LIVE guard rewriting 'my cortisol is high' to the real signal); (2) borrowed dynamic_mood (legacy, dead-ends at the dashboard); (3) persona ToneEngine (tone-shift LIVE + emotional_momentum DEAD).
subsystems.does: FIREWALL: _rewrite_affect_nicknames reads the live affect snapshot, names the real signal ('elevated, derived from <field>=<value>' / 'at baseline'), logs each attempt. DYNAMIC_MOOD: maps detected USER emotion -> a JARVIS 'mood' on identity_state, read ONLY by the dashboard (never a prompt). TONEENGINE: tone-shift state machine injects a persona instruction into the prompt (LIVE), but update_emotional_momentum is NEVER CALLED so emotional_momentum is permanently 0.0 (DEAD signal, still read into self-awareness report).
subsystems.gate: Firewall: none (unconditional honesty floor). dynamic_mood: trust!=low+confidence>0.4. ToneEngine: confidence>0.5; emotional_momentum has no producer.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Firewall: 0 rewrites until the LLM tries a nickname (healthy). dynamic_mood='neutral'/display-only. current_tone='professional' shifting with memory tags (live); emotional_momentum frozen at 0.00 forever (dead, distinguish from gated-empty).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Firewall: LIVE guard (constrains the voice from faking affect). dynamic_mood: NOT wired (display-only). Tone-shift: LIVE (persona prompt). emotional_momentum: plumbed on the read side but no producer (effectively dead).
subsystems.common_misread: Empty firewall counters = 'not running' (acts only on a nickname attempt). Assuming dynamic_mood makes JARVIS moody (display-only). emotional_momentum=0.0 'will fill in' (it won't — no caller). Conflating the three tracks.
evidence: brain/skills/capability_gate.py:1875-1937 (reads live snapshot, names real signal)

subsystems.name: Companion Cognition P0-P3 (situational_read + theory_of_mind + crystallization + behavior_advisory) + warmth quarantine + presence/env reads
subsystems.purpose: The Iron-Man/Cortana magic: a LIVE internal read during conversation + theory-of-mind person-model + read->behavior ladder (gated) + crystallization valve + companion-learning. Builds the inner life as a write-only journal that EARNS the right to steer the conversation.
subsystems.does: P0 situational_read builds a hypothesis-only read (engagement/sentiment/self-check + warmth axis) POST-reply (fires too late). P1 theory_of_mind folds reads into a per-person model (disposition/verbosity_pref/humor_reception, separate json, never soul). P2 crystallization-valve PROPOSES (never writes) crystallizing a stable model into a belief, logged against real gates. P3 behavior_advisory joins read+model into narrate-only suggestions (give_space/be_concise/lean_into_warmth) — APPLIES NOTHING (applied hardcoded False, return discarded). Warmth axis QUARANTINED from the P3->P4 gate. Presence-read + env-normal notice person/room shifts (never spoken).
subsystems.gate: P0->P1: >=30 reads + trigger-rate 0.02-0.70. P3->P4: >=40 advisories + >=0.25 person-aware fraction (structural proxy; true gate earned via feedback). P4 (apply) + P5 (correction-learning) are DESIGN-ONLY/planned.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: 0 reads/advisories, applied=False forever in P3, structural_ready=False. Empty + applied=False = NORMAL. Populates only on identified-speaker voice turns.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: shadow substrate — fires inside live turns but injects nothing (P3 return discarded; no consumer reads suggestions into a prompt). The style_instruction seam is fed by detect_style_intent, NOT this. Becomes wired only at the unbuilt earn-gated P4.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading 'advisory' authority as steering the reply (return discarded, applied=False is structural). Flagging empty reads/not-ready gate as broken (by-design until reps accrue). The post-hoc P0 timing is the KNOWN limitation TBS-0 addresses.

subsystems.name: Think-Before-Speak TBS-0 (pre-speech reader) + style_instruction wire
subsystems.purpose: Fix the timing flaw: the post-hoc P0 read fires a turn too LATE. TBS-0 proves the read can fire IN TIME (before generation) while injecting nothing — the glass-box that earns the right to eventually shape the reply via the proven style_instruction seam.
subsystems.does: Reads the CURRENT user turn BEFORE generation (pure-Python, no LLM), emits a pre-speech STANCE (lean_concise/give_space/match_warmth/none) + a would_inject prompt line (the EXACT line a future TBS-2 would ride the style_instruction seam with), from the learned ToM model. Logs to pre_speech_shadow.jsonl; injects into NOTHING (injects_prompt/shapes_reply structurally False; caller discards the return). The style_instruction wire IS live but is fed by detect_style_intent (explicit user delivery commands), not TBS.
subsystems.gate: TBS-0->TBS-1->TBS-2 earned by accuracy vs the post-hoc read + transcript review (operator-earned, model-agnostic). TBS-2 apply-path UNBUILT.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: phase='TBS-0_shadow_observe', injects_prompt=False, total_reads=0/stance='none' until ToM confidence crosses 0.30. Empty/none-heavy = NORMAL; durable log rebuilds counters on boot.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: shadow-only — fires pre-speech inside the live turn but touches nothing the user hears. The style_instruction seam it's shaped for is fed by a different (live) explicit-command parser.
subsystems.common_misread: Assuming it 'thinks before speaking' behaviorally (it injects nothing). Mistaking the live style_instruction seam for TBS-0's output. Do NOT wire would_inject into the prompt — that is the unbuilt earn-gated TBS-2 flip.
evidence: brain/reasoning/context.py:313-314 (style_instruction seam — fed by detect_style_intent, live)

subsystems.name: Operational Self-View (OSV — orchestrator + provenance + synthesizer + adapters + gather + articulate + grounding + api + p2-telemetry)
subsystems.purpose: Replaces fake self-knowledge (LLM/grep guessing) with a deterministic, provenance-tagged fused self-model JARVIS can truthfully talk about itself from. Powers self-introspection convo, voice grounding, spark targeting, purposeful self-improve.
subsystems.does: build_self_view gathers live sources (subsystem inventory via 18 bespoke read-only adapters that REFUSE TO GUESS, self-referential beliefs, scoreboard, skills/changes, world-model diagnostics) -> SelfViewSynthesizer (pure function -> 6 dimensions + first-class gaps + coverage). Provenance/Fact primitive makes is_measurement DERIVED from provenance (a self-scored value can never render as measured). articulate (P1) routes 8 self-question KINDs and renders the dimension DETERMINISTICALLY (LLM bypassed) with an unqualified-consciousness firewall. grounding (P2) is shadow (active=False hard-coded + OSV_P2_ACTIVE never set; double-shadow, detect+log only). Cache-timer warms the model every 2s.
subsystems.gate: Phase ladder P0-P5: P0-P2 shipped (read-only/shadow + P1 live driver); P3 curiosity targeting / P4 self-improve targeting / P5 continuous awareness are earned/unbuilt. P2 active behind OSV_P2_ACTIVE (default off, set nowhere).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: self_view.json absent until first cache tick -> P1 degrades to 'self-view isn't available yet'. Most subsystem facts render gap/unknown on a cold instance; scoreboard_composite=gap, predictive_accuracy=gap until validated reps. P2 zero repairs = healthy shadow. beliefs.self_beliefs=[] is the FIXED honest output (was the dead wire).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: P1 articulate is the ONE component that DRIVES behavior — authors the spoken self-reply, bypassing the LLM for self-facts. Orchestrator/synthesizer/adapters/gather/grounding/api/telemetry are read-only/shadow.
subsystems.common_misread: Calling the whole package 'shipped+driving' (only P1 drives; P0/P2 read-only/shadow). 'OSV unavailable' after reset = empty-until-first-cache by design. There is NO 'belief' KIND in articulate (a real coverage gap). P2 double-shadow is intentional belt-and-suspenders.

subsystems.name: Spark Grounding Ring (drive-promotion + telemetry-gate + queue + drive + tension-thought + p5b + win-rate + passive-metrics)
subsystems.purpose: Curiosity pointed OUTWARD to validate beliefs vs external truth — the audit keystone fix. A multi-station ring (read tension -> grounding drive -> tension thought -> operator-pull validation queue -> P5b autonomous research) gated shadow-first, earning ONLY on external_validation_rate (never self-scored).
subsystems.does: GroundingDrivePromotion (the gate that ACTUALLY drives research; shadow L0 -> advisory L1 -> active L2) earns on external_validation_rate>=0.40 over >=20 outcomes + 4h soak. SparkPromotion is telemetry-only (drives nothing). The grounding DriveType fires on belief tension (NOT dampened by user goals); at shadow it STILL enqueues into the live operator-pull GroundingQueue. GroundingQueue.answer() is the ONE live mutating path (operator-gated POST -> _ground_belief re-stamps provenance->user_claim). P5b shadow-research is a SEPARATE zero-authority gate (default-OFF). P5 win-rate counts grounded outcomes as wins only when the gate clears.
subsystems.gate: GroundingDrivePromotion external-validation gate; queue.answer operator-gated; P5b ENABLE_P5B_SHADOW default off + separate 0.70-accuracy gate; P5 win-rate gate (>=20 grounding outcomes + 0.40 rate + orphan trending down).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Drive level 0/shadow, queue empty/0 answered, P5b OFF, win-rate not superseded — ALL by-design. The loop is OPERATOR-PULL: starved until David answers /v2/grounding. Idle journal/research is by-design (P5 auto-fire earn-gated). High grounding_tension is the spark's FUEL not a deficit.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Mostly shadow/operator-pull. The ONE live mutating path is queue.answer()->_ground_belief (mutates the belief graph). At advisory/active the drive would touch the proactive ask/enqueue path.
subsystems.common_misread: Confusing GroundingDrivePromotion (drives research) with SparkPromotion (telemetry-only, drives nothing). Believing the whole ring is zero-authority (answer() IS live). A 'refuted/no' answer is a grounding WIN (externally anchored). spark_metrics docstring 3.3x is stale (20.5x is the belief-graph baseline).
evidence: brain/autonomy/orchestrator.py:2346-2348 (is_active gates enqueue), :2376-2409 (shadow still feeds pull queue)

subsystems.name: Policy NN — learned kernel controller (the shadow->active loop, signal-failure)
subsystems.purpose: A PyTorch controller that proposes operational knobs (budget/mode/response-length/thought-weights) from a 20-dim consciousness-state vector, scored in shadow A/B, intended to earn staged live control. The documented signal dead-end: built, wired, trains — but the reward carries no causal content.
subsystems.does: run_shadow_evaluation calls decide_raw for an un-governed proposal, records pending, scores retrospectively into a 500-slot A/B window (nn_reward=kernel_reward=actual_reward — no counterfactual). If win-rate clears the gate, promotion.tick flips a feature flag and decide() actuates via apply_policy_decision (genuinely routes to mode/budget/thought-weights/response-length). PromotionPipeline (real authority, flips flags) + PolicyEvaluator (DEVIATION_BONUS still applied) + ShadowPolicyRunner (M6 22-dim) + PolicyTrainer (advantage-weighted imitation) + ExperienceBuffer (5000-cap lived store, purges shadow_tick contamination) + PolicyGovernor (safety gate) + ModelRegistry (versioned, training_advisory read-only) + StateEncoder (20/22-dim) + PolicyTelemetry.
subsystems.gate: Two empty-by-design gates: evaluator eligibility (>=100, decisive_win_rate>0.55, margin>0.03) + per-feature auto-enable ladder (all 8 flags default False, 3 not auto-enableable). Quarantine can block. Inherits the signal failure -> gate effectively uncrossable.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: mode='shadow', enabled=True but has_active_features()=False -> decide() returns kernel_default, NOTHING actuates. A/B window resets to 0 each reboot (in-RAM). EXPECTED to STAY shadow because the signal is too weak to earn (MEASUREMENT-limited, not competence-limited). Do NOT lower the gate (§24).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: The actuation wire EXISTS (apply_policy_decision touches voice cadence/mode/thought-mix) but fires only on an earned flag, which never happens. As-shipped: computes+logs, drives nothing. The dormant consume-wire from broadcast competition to lived behavior.
subsystems.common_misread: enabled=True at boot = drives behavior (held in shadow; decide() live path gated behind empty flags). Or 'gated-but-fine, needs more reps' — it is MEASUREMENT-limited; soak will never promote it. low training loss = competence on a non-predictive synthetic distribution. DEVIATION_BONUS was NOT removed (only the circular stable-state credit was).

subsystems.name: SelfSensingLoop (lidar predict-beyond-persistence shadow growth engine + motion-gate + skill/LP/curiosity/health + persistence + tick-wiring + telemetry)
subsystems.purpose: The PROVEN non-operator autonomous-growth engine: harvests a real self-supervised signal from the senses (lidar) by predicting the next 12-sector range frame and rewarding error-reduction vs the persistence baseline. Offline-validated to carry real skill BEFORE being built (vs the policy NN dead-end).
subsystems.does: Every ~2s observe() scores the previous prediction vs the now-observed actual, refits a closed-form numpy ridge predictor every 20 obs (motion-gated: still sectors tie persistence, DYNAMIC_THRESH_M=2cm kills the phantom-motion static tax), reports skill (MSE-ratio vs persistence, dynamic + pooled — the un-gameable negative control), learning-progress (skill rising over refits), a per-sector curiosity target (shadow suggestion, no consumer), and a health regime (WARMING/STARVED/FAILED/EARNING). Persists state; ticked from main.py via a real lidar consume-wire.
subsystems.gate: none — intentionally permanently shadow at P0 (get_status HARDCODES authority {influences_behavior/writes_beliefs/writes_memory} all False). Future authority earn-gated behind an externally-attributed downstream win (Phase 2, unbuilt).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: Fresh/no lidar: obs=0, predictor unfitted, skill=None, regime='WARMING'. Quiet desk steady-state: dynamic_fraction ~0.2, skill VOLATILE (audit saw +0.46/-0.46), regime='STARVED', attention=False — NOT a stable +0.463 (first-30-min reading). Only regime='FAILED' (attention=True) is a real regression. Static room ties persistence (gate working).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Shadow-only OUTPUT (no voice/thought/behavior, authority hardcoded none). The INPUT (perception->loop, main.py:1001) is genuinely live-wired. Only telemetry to /api/self-sensing -> /v2 yardsticks.
subsystems.common_misread: Reading dynamic skill near 0/negative or pooled-all negative as broken — read the DYNAMIC number; near-zero at a quiet desk = STARVED (event-starved by design), not FAILED. +0.463 was volatile/event-bandwidth-gated, not steady-state. Static diff==0 = the motion gate working, not a dead predictor.

subsystems.name: Hemisphere substrate (orchestrator + registry + weight-persistence firewall + architect + engine + evolution + migration + gap-detector + data-feed + event-bridge)
subsystems.purpose: The NN-specialist subsystem: designs/trains/evolves networks, persists weights (re-earn authority firewall), runs the broadcast competition + Matrix births/promotions. The maturity-gated growth ladder.
subsystems.does: HemisphereOrchestrator run_cycle (gated by _enabled + gestation cadence throttle) refreshes priors, checks births, trains, updates slots, checks promotions/migration. HemisphereRegistry persists versioned weights (cap 3/focus). Boot restore reloads WEIGHTS but RESETS Tier-2 AUTHORITY (asymmetric firewall: weights persist, standing re-earns). NeuralArchitect designs topologies; HemisphereEngine = PyTorch build/train/eval off-thread; EvolutionEngine = crossover/mutation; MigrationAnalyzer = rule->neural readiness (never executes, active_substrate hardcoded RULE_BASED); CognitiveGapDetector emits gaps; DataFeed extracts tensors; event_bridge emits KERNEL_THOUGHT reflections (genuinely touches the thought stream, narrating NN lifecycle).
subsystems.gate: _enabled flag + gestation throttle + should_initiate_evolution; births MATRIX_BIRTH_MIN_SAMPLES=30 + 2 regimes + cap 3; promotions the 4-gate lifecycle.
subsystems.expected_idle_state: _enabled True but _networks empty until restore; slots all 0.0; 0 births/0 promotions; 0 gaps (healthy = no deficit); 0 evolution generations; active_substrate=RULE_BASED. ALL cold-start NORMAL.
subsystems.wired_to_experience: Substrate-mostly: only consume-wire is broadcast slots -> StateEncoder -> gated/signal-failed policy NN. event_bridge genuinely emits KERNEL_THOUGHT (advisory) for NN lifecycle, not per-tick signal values.
subsystems.common_misread: Empty slots/0 births/0 gaps = broken (cold-start; gaps are a deficit signal not a heartbeat). Restored Tier-2 at PROBATIONARY with 0 accuracy = 'lost training' (weights ARE back, only authority reset = the firewall).
evidence: brain/hemisphere/orchestrator.py:299-320 (Tier-2 restore resets authority, Tier-1 keeps accuracy)

subsystems.name: Matrix Tier-2 specialist lifecycle + 5 encoders + eligible-focuses + observability
subsystems.purpose: The earned-not-declared promotion machinery for Tier-2 Matrix specialists (positive/negative_memory, speaker_profile, temporal_pattern, skill_transfer): born only on accumulated real signal, walk a 4-gate ladder, promote in a separate matrix-vs-matrix lane.
subsystems.does: Each cycle: _observe_matrix_signals samples encoder features+regime; _check_matrix_births auto-births once a focus has >=30 samples + >=2 regimes (cap 3); _train trains (honesty guard refuses constant-label fits); _check_specialist_promotions walks epoch>0->acc>0.5->impact>0.3->lane-dwell>=10->PROMOTED. The 5 encoders (16-dim each) enforce strict contracts: positive=template/no accuracy-as-proxy, negative=no emotion_depth leak, speaker=no ECAPA-embedding leak, temporal=no schedule facts, skill_transfer=similarity!=capability. /api/matrix surfaces the ladder (not_born visible-not-silent).
subsystems.gate: 4 coded gates (epoch>0, accuracy>0.5, impact>0.3, lane dwell>=10) + birth gates (>=30 samples, cap 3).
subsystems.expected_idle_state: After reset: NO specialist born, all 5 focuses 'not_born', 0 promotions, signal buffers filling toward 30. ZERO Tier-2 specialists is the NORMAL post-reset state — they re-earn every gate; even PROMOTED grants only a broadcast slot (no spoken authority).
subsystems.wired_to_experience: SHADOW ONLY — _matrix_broadcast_slots consumed solely by matrix_report + dwell accrual; no consumer injects a Tier-2 output into a prompt/response. A PROMOTED Tier-2 drives nothing spoken.
subsystems.common_misread: Citing the doc's 'dormant end-to-end / zero production callers' (pre-Phase-M, stale — the lifecycle IS wired and runs every cycle). Calling 0 births broken (gated, needs live signal). PROMOTED grants a slot, NOT skill/capability authority.

subsystems.name: Distillation collector + 8 specialist signal feeds + weight-room gate + Tier-1 perception specialists
subsystems.purpose: The signal-capture layer feeding every distilled specialist (immune primitives: origin provenance, fidelity scoring, quarantine, weight-room synthetic-vs-lived counting), plus the lived-before-synthetic authority gate and the 8 shadow signal feeds.
subsystems.does: DistillationCollector.record() tags origin+fidelity, dedups, quarantines low-fidelity, serves lived-only batches; live_shadow_accuracy returns None below 10 samples (honesty floor, NOT 0.0). CONFIG defaults: barge_in_energy_rms=600.0, hits_required=4. Tunable/observable via GET /api/audio/barge-in. Endpointing: openWakeWord arms a listen, faster-whisper/Silero VAD detects speech-end after silence_duration_s=1.5 (shipped value), follow-up skips the wake word for 4s, speaking threshold x2.0 to resist self-trigger. Streaming ASR (the real fluidity fix) is ABSENT (roadmap only); speaker-gating for barge-in is PLANNED (energy-only fires on ANY loud voice today).
subsystems.gate: none — live runtime, config-tunable. Streaming ASR / speaker-gating deferred.
